overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a rainy night from an industrial covered corridor through desert wasteland to a small settlement. The vehicle transitions from paved roads to muddy off-road terrain, eventually stopping near NPCs at a desert outpost before continuing.

events.description: vehicle makes sharp right turn passing large graffiti-covered wall with 'NO FUTURE' text

metal railings lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a covered industrial corridor with concrete walls and metal railings. Overhead lights illuminate the wet asphalt as rain falls outside the covered area. The camera passes a prominent 'NO FUTURE' graffiti wall while making a turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial road transitioning to desert highway

events.description: exiting covered tunnel into open air with heavy rain visible against dark sky
turning vehicle onto unpaved dirt road entering desert terrain

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open road before turning onto desert dirt path, navigating through increasing rain

open desert landscape visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the covered corridor into open air where heavy rain is visible against the night sky. Concrete barriers line the road as the landscape opens up to desert terrain. The vehicle then turns onto an unpaved dirt road, leaving the asphalt behind.

events.description: ground surface changes from asphalt to muddy dirt and gravel
approaching distant settlement buildings with lights visible through the rain

agents.ego_description: navigating rough off-road terrain through heavy rain, heading toward distant settlement lights

arid desert ground with sparse vegetation

tall wooden electrical poles along the road
cluster of buildings with lights indicating a small outpost

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through open desert wasteland on a muddy dirt road, with heavy rain reducing visibility. Abandoned wooden structures and utility poles dot the landscape. In the distance, lights from a settlement become visible through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert outpost settlement with neon signs and outdoor seating

events.description: slowing to a stop near group of NPCs sitting at outdoor tables
accelerating and continuing drive through settlement

agents.ego_description: driving into settlement, stopping briefly to observe NPCs sitting outside a building, then continuing through the outpost

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting at outdoor table under white umbrellas, sheltering from rain

entered.detail: rustic wooden structure with porch and stairs
glowing blue neon sign on building facade
wooden tables and chairs arranged outside building
large white umbrellas providing cover for outdoor seating
metal fencing surrounding property boundaries

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a small desert settlement, stopping near a group of NPCs sitting at outdoor tables under white umbrellas. A blue neon sign glows on the wooden building. After a brief pause, the vehicle continues driving through the muddy settlement streets.

events.description: making wide turn around settlement buildings to exit area

agents.ego_description: navigating around the outskirts of the settlement, passing wooden fences and small shacks before heading back to open desert

entered.detail: wooden plank fencing running alongside the road
small corrugated metal shed structure
derelict red vehicle parked near buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives around the outer edges of the settlement, passing wooden fences and small metal shacks. The area is deserted as the vehicle makes a wide turn, passing an abandoned vehicle before heading back toward the open desert.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a rain-swept desert wasteland and through a remote settlement. It begins by navigating a covered concrete passage with metal railings and wet asphalt, passing a prominent NO FUTURE graffiti wall before turning toward the exit. As the vehicle leaves the shelter, the scene opens into a heavy downpour under a night sky, shifting from paved roads and concrete barriers onto a muddy, unpaved dirt track. The camera then pushes through the desolate wasteland past abandoned wooden structures and utility poles until the distant lights of a settlement emerge through the rain. Finally, the vehicle slows to a stop near NPCs under white umbrellas and a glowing blue neon sign before winding through the muddy outskirts past metal shacks and an abandoned car, eventually heading back toward the open desert.
